incident.description: Vehicle legally parked in a market parking space was struck on the front end and driver's side by a gray pickup truck attempting to park beside it. The other driver failed to judge distance and collided, causing significant damage. The other driver stayed and waited for police.
incident.location: Parking Lot, 2325 Main Street, Springfield, OH 45503

damages.description: Significant damage to front end and driver's side of vehicle.

extracted_data.additional_details: Time of incident was approximately 8:30 AM. Color of vehicle is Silver.

extraction_notes: No explicit damage details on windshield, bumper, headlights, hood, or grille were provided. Damage severity is described as significant but not quantified. License plate is visible from text. Date standardized. Some damage specifics missing due to narrative format.
